hooks.command:
# Auto-format after file edits (uncomment the right one for your project)
# npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" 2>/dev/null || true
# pnpm exec prettier --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" 2>/dev/null || true
echo 'File written: '$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS

# Block writes to sensitive files
for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do
  case "$f" in
    *.env|*.env.*|*credentials*|*secret*)
      echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot write to sensitive file: '$f
      exit 1
      ;;
  esac
done
